ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "parent_jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent jurisdiction (if applicable) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the health department */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection in the jurisdiction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the jurisdiction's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the case was reported */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number assigned by the health department */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient (if patient data is stored in a separate table) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the entity or person who reported the case */,
  "source_of_information" TEXT /* Source from which the case was reported (e.g., hospital, clinic, self-report) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the case */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the case data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new case, revised case) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the update */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Whether the update has been approved by a supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been approved by a supervisor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to make the comment (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the link belongs to */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_text" TEXT /* Text describing the link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the link */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the link */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_tags_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_tags_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the category */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_categories_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_categories_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the status belongs to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the status */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statuses_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statuses_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the outcome */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the symptom belongs to */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the symptom */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission source */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the transmission source belongs to */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission source */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the transmission source */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the transmission source was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_transmissions_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_transmissions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dose (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the vaccination information */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination information was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_vaccinations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_vaccinations_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the treatment belongs to */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the treatment information */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment information was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatments_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
